title: Movie and Popcorn - Colony (군체)
desc: Grab your popcorn! 🍿 For our next movie session, we are sliding into the thrilling sci-fi horror landscape of 'Colony' (군체). Directed by Yeon Sang-ho—the visionary behind 'Train to Busan', this project explores the terrifying birth of an evolving species. Check out the official subtitled trailer below and get ready for the suspense! 👇

title: ThermoTimelineMeter - from offline to online
desc: Successfully transitioned the ThermoTimelineMeter from an offline browser log into a live stream feed powered entirely by GitHub storage. Link below for the offline version.

title: UrProfile Update - Hash Routing
desc: Out with the old 404 reroutes, in with hash routing! Your profile links will now look like #/username—making them 100% stable on static hosting. Hit the link below to create your identity card and test it out. 👇

title: 尽管如此，还是 - 黄鲲
desc: 最近正在单曲循环的一首歌。🎧 虽然旋律里带着一丝淡淡的忧伤与触动；音符里却藏着一种温柔的坚定，像是在耳边的轻声呢喃，给予你拍拍尘土、继续前行的勇气。生活或许不易，‘尽管如此，还是’要勇敢。点击下方链接，一起戴上耳机感受这份治愈的力量吧。👇
